saved.emptyShared: No reports have been shared with you yet.
saved.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
dataOwnership.title: Data Ownership & Stewardship
dataOwnership.subtitle: Assign and track data owners and stewards across your data landscape.

dataOwnership.noResults: No results found for your search.

dataDomain.subtitle: Browse your data landscape organized by domain, owner, or classification.

dataClassification.title: Data Classification & Sensitivity
dataClassification.subtitle: Track data object classifications and sensitivity levels across your organization.
dataClassification.noResults: No results found for your search.
appDataCrud.title: Application-Data CRUD Matrix
appDataCrud.subtitle: Track Create, Read, Update, Delete operations between applications and data objects.
appDataCrud.empty: No application-data relationships found. Create relations between Applications and DataObjects to track CRUD operations.
dataRelationship.title: Data Object Relationship Model
dataRelationship.subtitle: Explore relationships and dependencies between data objects in your architecture.
dataRelationship.noRelations: No relationships defined between data objects yet.
dataRelationship.search: Search by name or relation type…
dataRelationship.noResults: No results found for your search.
currentVsTarget.title: Current vs Target Comparison
currentVsTarget.subtitle: Compare architecture elements across current and target states to identify gaps and transitions.
gapSummary.title: Gap Summary
gapSummary.subtitle: Identify gaps between current and target architectures that require initiatives to close.
gapSummary.noGaps: No gaps identified. Architecture is aligned with target state.
targetLandscape.title: Target Architecture Landscape
targetLandscape.subtitle: Preview the target state architecture with planned deployments and ownership.
transitionRoadmap.title: Transition Roadmap by Wave
transitionRoadmap.subtitle: Plan and track architecture transitions across delivery waves.
initiativeGapTraceability.title: Initiative-to-Gap Traceability
initiativeGapTraceability.subtitle: Track which initiatives are addressing which gaps in the transition roadmap.
initiativeGapTraceability.empty: No initiatives linked to gaps yet.
viewLibrary.title: EA View Library
viewLibrary.subtitle: Start with an architecture concern, then drill into the right interactive view. These views connect strategy, business, applications, data, technology and governance without changing the underlying metamodel.
viewLibrary.drillHint: Select a view card to drill in
viewLibrary.search.placeholder: Search views by name or purpose…
viewLibrary.search.emptyBody: Try a different search term or clear the domain filter.
viewLibrary.domain.enterprise.title: Enterprise
viewLibrary.domain.enterprise.body: Executive views for strategy, roadmaps, investment focus and enterprise-level change.
viewLibrary.domain.business.title: Business
viewLibrary.domain.business.body: Capability, process and service views that show how the business is structured and supported.
viewLibrary.domain.application.title: Application
viewLibrary.domain.application.body: Application portfolio, summary, dependency and rationalization views for portfolio decisions.
viewLibrary.domain.data.title: Data & Integration
viewLibrary.domain.data.body: Data domains, interfaces and interoperability views that show how information moves.
viewLibrary.domain.technology.title: Technology
viewLibrary.domain.technology.body: Reference model, lifecycle and standards views for technology governance.
viewLibrary.domain.governance.title: Governance
viewLibrary.domain.governance.body: Impact, gap, risk and compliance views for controlled architecture change.
viewLibrary.view.strategyMap.title: Strategy Map
viewLibrary.view.strategyMap.body: Connect objectives to initiatives, capabilities and applications so leaders can see what delivers strategy.
viewLibrary.view.roadmap.title: Transformation Roadmap
viewLibrary.view.roadmap.body: Show planned changes and lifecycle movement across time, grouped by architecture dimension.
viewLibrary.view.capabilityMap.title: Business Capability Map
viewLibrary.view.capabilityMap.body: View the business capability hierarchy with application and heatmap overlays.
viewLibrary.view.processMap.title: Process Landscape Map
viewLibrary.view.processMap.body: Drill through the process hierarchy and see supporting applications, data objects, maturity, automation and risk.
viewLibrary.view.serviceTraceability.bod: Start from a service and trace the processes, applications, data and technology that deliver it.
viewLibrary.view.applicationLayer.title: Application Layer Overview
viewLibrary.view.applicationLayer.body: See how applications connect business capabilities, integrations, technology and data in one navigable layer view.
viewLibrary.view.applicationSummary.body: Open one application and see its business, data, technology and governance relationships in one navigable page.
viewLibrary.view.portfolio.title: Application Portfolio
viewLibrary.view.portfolio.body: Slice applications by ownership, lifecycle, criticality, cost, tags and related architecture context.
viewLibrary.view.dependencies.title: Application Dependency Viewer
viewLibrary.view.dependencies.body: Navigate inbound and outbound dependencies interactively from a selected application or card.
viewLibrary.view.rationalization.title: Application Rationalization
viewLibrary.view.rationalization.body: Assess applications for tolerate, invest, migrate or eliminate decisions and track outcomes.
viewLibrary.view.dataFlow.title: Data Domain & Flow Map
viewLibrary.view.dataFlow.body: Show data objects, data domains, applications and interfaces to expose information movement.
viewLibrary.view.interop.title: Integration & Interoperability
viewLibrary.view.interop.body: Review interfaces and data exchanges with classification, routing and connected applications.
viewLibrary.view.referenceModels.title: Reference Models
viewLibrary.view.referenceModels.body: Explore classification coverage across business, application, data and technology reference models.
viewLibrary.view.lifecycle.title: Lifecycle View
viewLibrary.view.lifecycle.body: Track application and technology lifecycle phases and identify end-of-life exposure.
viewLibrary.view.techStandards.title: Technology Standards Radar
viewLibrary.view.techStandards.body: Review preferred, tolerated, sunset and prohibited technology standards and exceptions.
viewLibrary.view.impact.title: Change Impact Workbench
viewLibrary.view.impact.body: Pick a card and assess the blast radius of modification, replacement or retirement.
viewLibrary.view.gap.title: Gap Analysis
viewLibrary.view.gap.body: Compare current, transition and target states and identify changes without delivery traceability.
viewLibrary.view.grc.title: GRC Workspace
viewLibrary.view.grc.body: Navigate governance, risk and compliance views that protect architecture decisions.
applicationSummary.title: Application Summary
applicationSummary.subtitle: A navigable one-page view of an application's business, data, technology and governance context.
applicationSummary.empty: Select an application to open its summary.
applicationSummary.noRelations: No relationships are linked to this application yet.
applicationLayer.title: Application Layer Overview
applicationLayer.subtitle: Understand how applications are organized, interact, and deliver value across the enterprise.
applicationLayer.band.applicationHint: How work is automated and delivered
applicationLayer.empty.capabilities: No business capabilities are available yet.
applicationLayer.empty.technology: No technology components are available yet.
applicationLayer.empty.data: No data objects are available yet.
applicationLayer.relationships.title: Key Relationships
applicationLayer.lifecycle.title: Application Lifecycle
applicationLayer.lifecycle.subtitle: Distribution of applications by phase
applicationLayer.lifecycle.empty: No lifecycle dates set on any application
applicationLayer.filters.title: Quick filters
applicationLayer.filters.subtitle: Jump into the inventory pre-filtered
applicationLayer.filters.atRisk: Apps at risk (phase-out or low quality)
applicationLayer.actions.title: Quick Actions
applicationLayer.portfolio.title: Application Portfolio by Category
applicationLayer.health.title: Application Health Summary
applicationLayer.health.score: Healthy by data quality and lifecycle
applicationLayer.critical.title: Top Applications by Business Criticality
applicationLayer.critical.empty: No critical applications are currently identified.
applicationLayer.signals.title: At a Glance
applicationLayer.signals.atRisk_one: {{count}} application at risk (lifecycle or data quality)
applicationLayer.signals.atRisk_other: {{count}} applications at risk (lifecycle or data quality)
applicationLayer.note: The Application Layer bridges business needs and technology. This view uses existing cards, subtypes, stakeholders, lifecycle and data-quality signals only.
applicationLayer.metric.healthAria: Application Health {{percent}} percent, {{healthy}} of {{total}} applications healthy
portfolio.title: Application Portfolio
flexiblePortfolio.title: Flexible Portfolio
portfolio.noAppsEmpty: No applications found. Create applications to see the portfolio.
portfolio.noItemsEmpty: No {{type}} found. Create some to see the portfolio.
portfolio.aiNoInsights: No insights could be generated for the current portfolio view.
capabilityMap.title: Business Capability Map
capabilityMap.noCapabilities: No Business Capabilities found. Add capabilities to see the heatmap.
lifecycle.title: Technology Lifecycle
dependency.title: Dependencies
dependency.selectCardDesc: Search and pick a starting point. Click to center, then expand branches interactively.
dependency.alsoAppears: Also appears elsewhere in this tree
dependency.clickToExpand: Click to expand · Right-click to re-center
dependency.ldvNoData: No dependency data. Adjust the type filter or create relations between cards.
dependency.shiftClickHint: Shift+click or long-press a card to center diagram on it
dependency.showHierarchyMarkersHint: Mark cards that have a parent or children not shown — use the Reveal tools to bring them in
dependency.hasHiddenParent: Has a parent not shown — use Reveal parent
dependency.hasHiddenChildren: Has children not shown — use Reveal children
dependency.showEndOfLifeHint: Include related cards whose lifecycle has reached End of Life. The card you are centered on is always shown.
dependency.showRelationValuesHint: When a relation carries a qualifying value (e.g. Support Type «Leading»), show it next to the label, like supports [Leading]. Relations without a value are unchanged.
dependency.extraFieldsHint: Choose attributes to show on each card (first {{count}} appear on the card, all in the tooltip).
dependency.highlightMode: Highlight mode: click a card to highlight its connections
cost.title: Cost Analysis
cost.costSourceHelp: Sum costs from related cards. Each entry targets a unique (type, field), so no card is counted twice.
cost.drillDown.hint: Tip: click a rectangle to break down its cost.
matrix.title: Matrix
matrix.noData: No data found for this combination.
dataQuality.title: Data Quality
dataQuality.orphanedAlert: {{count}} cards have no relations (orphaned). Consider linking them to related items.
dataQuality.staleAlert: {{count}} cards haven't been updated in 90+ days. Review for accuracy.
dataQuality.overallAlert: Overall data quality is {{pct}}%. Focus on improving completeness.
eol.title: End-of-Life & Impact
eol.manualTooltip: End-of-Life date was manually maintained in the Lifecycle section, not from endoflife.date API
eol.noEolData: No cards with EOL data found. Link an Application or IT Component to endoflife.date, or set an End of Life date in the Lifecycle section.
eol.noFilterMatch: No items match the current filters.
eol.eolReached_one: {{count}} item has reached End of Life
eol.eolReached_other: {{count}} items have reached End of Life
eol.approaching_one: {{count}} item is approaching End of Life within 6 months
eol.approaching_other: {{count}} items are approaching End of Life within 6 months
processMap.title: Process Landscape Map
processMap.noProcessesFiltered: No processes match the current filters.
processMap.noProcessesEmpty: No Business Processes found. Add processes to see the landscape map.
dependency.expandMode: Expand mode: click a card to reveal all its relations
dependency.revealParentsMode: Reveal-parent mode: click a card to add its hierarchy parent
dependency.revealChildrenMode: Reveal-children mode: click a card to add its direct children
dependency.createDiagramHint: Creates an editable diagram in the Diagram module. Each shape stays linked to its inventory card.
dependency.createDiagramError: Could not create the diagram. Please try again.
cost.permissionDeniedBody: You don't have permission to view cost reports. Ask an administrator to grant you the «costs.view» permission, or become a stakeholder on the cards whose costs you need.
transformationRoadmap.title: Transformation Roadmap
transformationRoadmap.empty: No cards with lifecycle dates to plot. Set lifecycle phases on cards to see them here.
transformationRoadmap.name: Name
impact.title: Change Impact Workbench
impact.emptyState: Select a card to assess the impact of changing it.
impact.headline: {{num}} cards affected by {{change}} of «{{name}}»
strategyMap.title: Executive Strategy Map
strategyMap.noInitiatives: No initiatives linked to this objective yet.
strategyMap.emptyState: No strategic objectives found. Create Objective cards and link them to capabilities and initiatives.
rationalization.title: Application Rationalization
rationalization.emptyState: No assessments yet. Create one to start assessing applications with the TIME framework.
rationalization.rationaleHelper: The strategic reason for this decision. Shown on the review board so stakeholders can see the case without opening the record.
rationalization.riskNoteHelper: Known risks or transition dependencies for this decision.
rationalization.notesHelper: How the decision will be carried out (steps, phasing, decommission plan).
freshness.title: Repository Freshness
techStandards.title: Technology Standards
kpiScorecard.title: KPI Scorecard
kpiScorecard.subtitle: Performance indicators (NORA PRM): baseline, current and target values with direction-aware progress.
kpiScorecard.empty: No KPI cards yet. Create KPIs and link them to objectives, services and initiatives.
referenceModels.title: NORA Reference Models
referenceModels.subtitle: Coverage and distribution across NORA's four reference-model classifications (BRM, ARM, DRM, TRM). Click a bar or row to jump to the matching inventory filter.
referenceModels.noCards: No {{type}} cards yet. Create some to start classifying.
referenceModels.notAvailable: Field {{field}} is not present on card type {{type}}. Enable the NORA framework profile in Admin → Settings → Modules to activate this reference model.
referenceModels.model.brm.name: Business Reference Model (BRM)
referenceModels.model.brm.description: The hierarchy level assigned to each Business Capability — Business Area, Line of Business, Business Function or Sub-Business Function.
referenceModels.model.arm.name: Application Reference Model (ARM)
referenceModels.model.arm.description: The standard category each Application falls into — ERP, CRM, Portal, Case Management, etc. Once DGA publishes the official NEA ARM taxonomy, the option list will be replaced with the canonical codes.
referenceModels.model.drm.name: Data Reference Model (DRM)
referenceModels.model.drm.description: The NDMO data classification level of each Data Object — Public, Restricted, Secret or Top Secret. Drives GSB routing rules and compliance findings.
referenceModels.model.trm.name: Technology Reference Model (TRM)
referenceModels.model.trm.description: The hosting model of each IT Component — On-Premise, Government Cloud, Public Cloud or Hybrid. Used to assess cloud maturity and sovereignty risk.
interop.title: Integration & Interoperability
interop.subtitle: Every interface and data exchange with its classification, GSB routing and connected applications.
interop.sensitiveHint: Exchanges carrying secret or top-secret data outside the Government Service Bus: {{count}}. Route them via GSB or record a waiver.
interop.empty: No interfaces or data exchanges yet.
orgChart.title: Organization Chart
orgChart.subtitle: The organizational hierarchy — the NORA Business Architecture org-chart artifact.
serviceTraceability.title: Service Traceability
serviceTraceability.subtitle: How a government service is delivered: processes, applications, data and technology within two relation hops.
serviceTraceability.empty: No related cards yet — link the service to processes and applications first.
gapAnalysis.title: Gap Analysis
gapAnalysis.subtitle: Current vs target architecture deltas and the transition initiatives that deliver them.
gapAnalysis.untraceableHint: Changes without a delivering initiative: {{count}}. Assign them so the transition roadmap stays traceable.
gapAnalysis.empty: No target or transition changes yet. Mark cards with an architecture state to start planning.
techStandards.name: Name
resilience.title: Resilience & Critical Services
resilience.noSpofs: No single points of failure detected.
arb.title: Architecture Review Board
arb.emptyState: No reviews yet. Schedule one to bring governance context together for a decision.
scenarios.title: Scenario Planning
scenarios.emptyState: No scenarios yet. Branch one to plan a target architecture and compare As-Is vs To-Be.
dataFlow.title: Data Domain & Flow Map
dataFlow.emptyState: No data objects yet. Model data entities and link them to applications and interfaces.
integration.title: Integration Hub
integration.emptyState: No integrations configured. Connect a source to populate this dashboard.
scenarios.confirmDelete: Delete scenario «{{name}}»? This cannot be undone.
rationalization.confirmDeleteDecision: Remove this application from the campaign?
techStandards.confirmDeleteStandard: Delete standard «{{name}}»? This cannot be undone.
rationalization.confirmDeleteAssessment: Delete assessment «{{name}}»? This cannot be undone.

maturity.title: EA Maturity Self-Assessment
maturity.subtitle: Score the EA function across maturity dimensions and track the trend over time.
maturity.noTrend: Submit an assessment to see the trend
maturity.promoteHint: Promote this maturity gap to an improvement opportunity
maturity.suggestedHint: Suggested from live repository evidence — the assessor confirms or overrides.

indicator.soaw_coverage: Initiatives with a Statement of Architecture Work
indicator.budget_tracking: Initiatives with budget or cost tracking
indicator.catalogue_alignment: Capabilities aligned to the national catalogue

serviceCatalogue.title: Service Catalogue
serviceCatalogue.subtitle: Every government service with its beneficiaries, delivery channels, maturity, fee model and SLA.
serviceCatalogue.empty: No government services yet. Enable the NORA profile and create Government Service cards.

layerOverview.title: {{layer}} — Layer Overview
layerOverview.subtitle: Health, composition and data quality across this architecture layer.
layerOverview.empty: No cards in this layer yet.
layerOverview.viewAllInventory: View all {{count}} remaining cards in the inventory
layerOverview.mappingEmpty: No cross-layer relations captured yet. Link cards from this layer to other layers to build traceability.
layerOverview.integrationEmpty: No relations between cards within this layer.

about.business: Capabilities, services, processes, objectives, and the operating model of the organization.
about.beneficiary: Beneficiary groups, journeys, channels, touchpoints, pain points, and accessibility needs.
about.application: Applications, modules, integrations, APIs, vendors, lifecycle, and modernization needs.
about.data: Data domains, entities, ownership, classification, quality, sharing, and analytics.
about.technology: Infrastructure, hosting, cloud, network, middleware, capacity, backup, and disaster recovery.
about.security: Controls, identity and access, data protection, network security, compliance, risks, and standards.

layerSummary.title: {{layer}} — Card Summary
layerSummary.subtitle: Pick a card to see its relationships across every architecture layer.
layerSummary.empty: Select a card to see its cross-layer relationships.
layerSummary.noRelations: This card has no relationships yet.

securityLayer.title: Security Layer
securityLayer.subtitle: Security & compliance posture across the landscape — risks and regulation compliance.
securityLayer.noAccess: You don’t have access to risk or compliance data.
securityLayer.cardsEmpty: No Security card types yet — apply the NORA profile to add Security Controls.

layersDashboard.heroTitle: Understand the full enterprise architecture from beneficiaries to security controls.
layersDashboard.heroText: One connected picture across the six EA layers: business capabilities and services, beneficiary journeys, applications, data, technology, and security controls.

traceability.title: Relationships / Traceability view
traceability.subtitle: Select one card and see connected components across all EA layers — journeys, services, applications, data, infrastructure, and controls.
traceability.empty: Pick a card above to explore its connections across the six EA layers.
traceability.noConnections: No direct relationships captured for this card.

technologyLandscape.title: Technology Landscape
technologyLandscape.subtitle: IT components by data-center containment (DC ⊃ host ⊃ VM ⊃ container engine) and network segment — the NEA Technology-Architecture landscape viewpoints.
technologyLandscape.dcEmpty: No data centers modelled yet — create IT components with the Data Center subtype and nest hosts/VMs beneath them.
technologyLandscape.unassigned: Not assigned to a data center
technologyLandscape.segmentEmpty: No network segments captured yet — fill the Network segment field in the Technical Specification section.
securityLayer.componentsEmpty: No security components modelled yet — create IT components with the Security Hardware / Software / Service subtypes.
viewLibrary.nea.title: NEA viewpoint registry
viewLibrary.nea.subtitle: The ~47 core viewpoints of the National EA Viewpoints Document (Dec 2024) mapped to the Turbo EA view that produces each one. Produced in methodology phases 2.3 (current state) and 4.2 (target state).
strategicHouse.title: Strategic House
strategicHouse.subtitle: Vision, mission, strategic pillars and their objectives — the NEA Strategic-Alignment house viewpoint.
strategicHouse.visionEmpty: No vision recorded yet — an admin can add it here.
strategicHouse.missionEmpty: No mission recorded yet — an admin can add it here.
strategicHouse.pillarsEmpty: No pillars yet — create Strategic Pillar cards and link objectives to them with the supports relation.
strategicHouse.otherObjectives: Objectives not assigned to a pillar
valueChain.title: Business Value Chain
valueChain.subtitle: Top-tier business capabilities as a value-chain ribbon — core capabilities form the chain; strategic and supporting capabilities sit in their own bands.
appModules.title: Application Modules
appModules.subtitle: The application hierarchy (application ⊃ modules) — the NEA application-modules landscape viewpoint.
strategyCascade.title: Strategy Cascade
strategyCascade.subtitle: Strategic pillars ⊃ strategic objectives → programs ⊃ initiatives ⊃ projects — the full line of sight from strategy to delivery, with unaligned work flagged.
strategyCascade.noObjectives: No objectives under this pillar yet — nest Objective cards beneath it.
strategyCascade.noDelivery: No programs or initiatives linked yet.
strategyCascade.unpillared: Objectives not assigned to a pillar
strategyCascade.unalignedWarning: {{n}} initiative(s) are not traceable to any strategic objective — link them (or their parent program) to an objective.
strategyCascade.empty: No strategy modelled yet — create Strategic Pillar cards, link objectives to them with the supports relation, and link programs to objectives the same way.
techPortfolio.title: Technology Portfolio
techPortfolio.subtitle: Inventory of technology assets and their deployment characteristics.
cloudAdoption.title: Cloud Adoption
cloudAdoption.subtitle: Analyze deployment models and cloud migration progress.
techStack.title: Technology Stack
techStack.subtitle: View technology components organized by architectural layer.
securityControls.title: Security Controls Coverage
securityControls.subtitle: Overview of security control implementation across applications.
standardsMatrix.title: Standards Compliance Matrix
standardsMatrix.subtitle: Application compliance against architecture standards and best practices.
principlesTraceability.title: Principles & Standards Traceability
principlesTraceability.subtitle: Track how well applications align with enterprise architecture principles.
exceptionWaiver.title: Exception & Waiver Matrix
exceptionWaiver.subtitle: Manage and track approved exceptions and waivers to architecture standards.
exceptionWaiver.empty: No exceptions or waivers. Architecture is fully aligned.
personaCatalog.title: Persona Catalog
personaCatalog.subtitle: Beneficiary personas, demographics, goals, and pain points.
personaCatalog.empty: No personas found. Create Persona cards to build your beneficiary model.
personaCatalog.col.name: Persona
journeyMap.title: Journey Map
journeyMap.subtitle: Visualize beneficiary journeys with stages, touchpoints, and satisfaction metrics.
journeyMap.empty: No journeys found. Create Journey cards to map beneficiary experiences.
touchpointMatrix.title: Touchpoint Matrix
touchpointMatrix.subtitle: Personas × channels and touchpoints showing usage and satisfaction.
experienceHeatmap.title: Experience Heatmap
experienceHeatmap.subtitle: Journey stages heatmap showing satisfaction and pain levels.
beneficiaryLandscape.title: Beneficiary Landscape
beneficiaryLandscape.subtitle: Organization units × beneficiary groups and engagement metrics.
serviceTouchpoint.title: Service Touchpoint Traceability
serviceTouchpoint.subtitle: Government services with their delivery channels and touchpoints.

rmLibrary.title: Reference Models
rmLibrary.subtitle: Per-domain classification schemes (NEA National Reference Models). Publish a model to back the code fields on cards.
rmLibrary.importHint: Upload an .xlsx file with the columns Code, Parent Code, Name, Name (Arabic), Description and Sort Order. Items are matched by code.
rmLibrary.emptyDomain: No reference models in this domain yet.
rmLibrary.emptyItems: No items yet — add the first classification entry or import a file.
rmLibrary.publishNeedsGovernance: Publishing requires the governance approval permission
rmLibrary.publishConfirmBody: «{{name}}» becomes the active reference model for the {{domain}} domain. A previously published model in this domain is archived automatically.

personaBeneficiaryMapping.title: Persona→Beneficiary Mapping
personaBeneficiaryMapping.subtitle: Map beneficiary personas to their journeys, applications, and touchpoints across the organization.

neaDashboard.title: NEA Viewpoints Dashboard
neaDashboard.subtitle: Complete reference of all 47 National EA viewpoints organized by methodology phase and domain.
neaDashboard.summaryText: All 47 NEA viewpoints are organized across {{phases}} methodology phases and {{domains}} EA domains. Each viewpoint is defined by its stakeholder questions, visualization kind (list/matrix/diagram), and abstraction level (conceptual/logical/physical).
